docs.event: On 27 July 2023, at 10:52 am, Sam thanked Evan for his support, expressing gratitude for Evan's assistance. On 27 August 2023, at 10:18 am, Sam thanked Evan for providing information about a location that was only a two-hour drive away, praising the incredible views and peaceful atmosphere. On 18 May 2023, at 1:47 pm, Sam thanked Evan for encouragement, sharing his hope to find something as passionate as Evan's watercolor painting. Evan advised Sam to keep trying new things until something sparked his excitement, to which Sam expressed enthusiasm and gratitude.

On December 9, 2023, at 1:45 pm, Evan bid farewell to Sam, expressing gratitude for Sam's support and mentioning their upcoming family reunion next summer. Sam offered to provide tips on organizing the event and expressed willingness to support Evan's family milestones. Evan thanked Sam and promised to keep them updated. Sam responded by wishing Evan well and looking forward to hearing about the event. They both said their goodbyes. Later, on December 5, 2023, at 8:16 pm, Evan thanked Sam again and said they would keep in touch, ending their conversation with a farewell. Sam bid farewell to Evan, wishing them well and looking forward to updates.

On 27 July 2023 at 10:52 am, Sam expressed gratitude to Evan, saying, 'Thanks, Evan! Your support means a lot. I really appreciate it.' Evan responded with, 'No worries, you've got this!' and 'No worries, Sam. I'm here if you need me. Keep going!' On 25 October 2023 at 2:56 pm, Sam again expressed gratitude to Evan, saying, 'Thanks for the reminder to take it easy. I sometimes get impatient with myself when I want results fast, but I gotta be patient.' Evan agreed, saying, 'Yep, progress takes time. So just take it one step at a time.' Sam acknowledged, 'Yes, you're right, Evan. Taking it slow is better than doing too much. I appreciate your support.'

On 4:09 pm on 13 August, 2023, Evan expressed sympathy towards Sam's health issues and offered assistance. Evan acknowledged Sam's health struggles and advised him to take care of himself, emphasizing the importance of self-care. Sam shared his progress with a new diet and exercise routine, which had improved his health significantly. Evan, on the other hand, disclosed that he had twisted his knee and was struggling to stay consistent with his fitness routine, expressing frustration. Sam offered to help Evan, showing his support and concern for his friend's well-being.
